name: OWASP_A03_Injection_Attack_Detection
search: index="web_logs" method IN ("GET", "POST") | search uri="*<script>*" OR uri="*%3Cscript%3E*" OR uri="*alert(*" OR uri="*UNION*SELECT*" OR uri="*OR*1=1*" OR uri="*%27*" OR uri="*--*" OR uri="*cat*/etc/*" | iplocation clientip | fillnull value="Unknown" Country, City | stats count as hadise_sayi, latest(_time) as son_gorulme by clientip, Country, City, uri | eval OWASP_Category="A03:2021-Injection", Alert_Level="CRITICAL", Hadise="İnyeksiya Hücumu (SQLi/XSS)" | eval son_gorulme = strftime(son_gorulme, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table son_gorulme, clientip, Country, City, uri, hadise_sayi, OWASP_Category, Alert_Level, Hadise
description: SQL inyeksiyası, XSS və LFI cəhdlərini URI pattern-ləri vasitəsilə aşkarlayır.
